title: MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise Technique
description: One MITRE ATT&CK (Enterprise/IT) technique or sub-technique, generated deterministically from the official ATT&CK STIX bundle by kbs/_tools/gen_mitre.py. The Guardian incident-investigation agent semantically searches this corpus (knowledge_search) to ground analysis of Cortex XSIAM/XSOAR alerts, which carry ATT&CK technique ids. Distinct from soc-investigation (hand-written narrative investigation guides) — this is exhaustive, terse reference, regenerated on each MITRE refresh.

id.description: The ATT&CK technique id (e.g. 'T1059' or sub-technique 'T1059.001'). Used as the doc id so re-loads are idempotent.

tags.description: Tactic + platform slugs; surface as UI filter chips.

framework_version.description: ATT&CK version the doc was generated from (e.g. '19.1') — pinned for reproducible regen.

parent_id.description: For sub-techniques, the parent technique id (e.g. 'T1059').
